### Post by wr0x2 on 2007-08-20
I have two monitors running from an ATI Radeon 9800 Pro. Here's the output from fglrxinfo:
```

wr0x2@USSENTERPRISE:~$ fglrxinfo
display: :0.0  screen: 0
OpenGL vendor string: ATI Technologies Inc.
OpenGL renderer string: RADEON 9800 Pro Generic
OpenGL version string: 2.0.5946 (8.27.10)

```

and here's my xorg.conf:
```


# /etc/X11/xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)

Section "Device"
	Identifier  "aticonfig-Device[0]"

	Option	    "DesktopSetup" "horizontal"
	BusID       "PCI:2:0:0"

Section "Device"
	Identifier  "aticonfig-Device[1]"
	Driver      "fglrx"
	BusID       "PCI:2:0:0"
	Screen      1
EndSection

Section "Screen"
	Identifier "Default Screen"
	Device     "ATI Technologies, Inc. Radeon R350 NH [Radeon 9800 Pro]"
	Monitor    "HG216"
	DefaultDepth     24
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth     1
		Modes    "1680x1050" "1280x1024" "1024x768" "800x600" "640x480"

	SubSection "Display"

	SubSection "Display"

		Depth     24

EndSection

Section "Screen"
	Identifier "aticonfig-Screen[0]"
	Device     "aticonfig-Device[0]"
	Monitor    "aticonfig-Monitor[0]"
	DefaultDepth     24
	SubSection "Display"
		Viewport   0 0
		Depth     24
	EndSubSection
EndSection

Section "Screen"
	Identifier "aticonfig-Screen[1]"
	Device     "aticonfig-Device[1]"
	Monitor    "aticonfig-Monitor[1]"
	DefaultDepth     24
	SubSection "Display"
		Viewport   0 0
		Depth     24
	EndSubSection
EndSection

Section "DRI"
	Mode         0666
EndSection

```

When I try to run the game stepmania. I get a black window if I choose to run it windowed. If I run it fullscreen then my main monitor goes black and my secondary moniter changes resolution to match stepmania's native fullscreen resolution, 640x480. Audio and key inputs still work but since I can't see anything I obviously can't play the game. What do I need to do to get this working?
